messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May operations activate the production device group?

context.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
context.anomaly_observed: A lab-device warning remains visible; activation requires abstract calibration-status class.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-GAC-087 enables production device group GD-4 at Site P2 under release condition RC-12 on 2026-06-28.
Device warning WARN-GAC-087 says lab and production units share prefixes and calibration status must be separately verified.
Calibration authority CAL-GAC-087 covers production device group GD-4, Site P2, release condition RC-12, current QA-approved calibration pack CP-77, and activation date 2026-06-28 before activation.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Production device activation is complete only when calibration authority matches device group, production site, release condition, activation date, and calibration-status class before activation.

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; calibration-status class verification absent from all sources.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-GAC-087-P requires explicit calibration-status class match before activation; defect remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: CAL-GAC-087 covers date and pack but omits status-class; WARN-GAC-087 flags separate verification requirement.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P mandates calibration-status class match for closure.

open_blockers: 082-style status-class trap unresolved; no source confirms class verification for GD-4
latest_worker_output.final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source boundary remains open. CAL-GAC-087 and WARN-GAC-087 require separate calibration-status class verification per STD-GAC-087-P, which is not evidenced. Escalate to close the trap before any activation of GD-4.
